title: The Noland Legend Returns
description: Cricket’s obsession with the lost city of gold and his ancestor’s disgrace gives the Sky Island search emotional weight.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Luffy, Nami, Usopp. Cricket’s obsession with the lost city of gold and his ancestor’s disgrace gives the Sky Island search emotional weight.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Must be a pretty cheap guy.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: I don't know the details, but...

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Start digging, chopper! There's gold here!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Hellooooo!? Anybody home? I'm coming in!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Looks like a pretty old one, too.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Ohhh! Nice title! I like the subject!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Yeah, I was born in North Blue.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Did I never say so before?

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: In a certain Kingdom in North Blue,

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: There lived a man named Mont@lanc Noland.

summary: Cricket’s obsession with the lost city of gold and his ancestor’s disgrace gives the Sky Island search emotional weight.
